productDisplayName: Nike Women Court Majestic White Shoes
description: Designed in a low profile silhouette for the ace tennis player, the nike Court Majestic for women is as stylish as it is comfy. With cushioned comfort and a grippy outsole, this shoe also doubles up as a perfect casual sneaker.UpperSynthetic leather upper with nike swoosh overlays on either side of the midfoot for styleLacing system for a snug, customised FitCushioned tongue and collar for snug comfortPadded footbed for enhanced cushioning and impact protectionMidsolePhylon midsole for absolute shock absorption and lightweight comfortOutsoleTPR outsole with herringbone grooves for optimal traction Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
